title: Craftable Trial Key
description: Now you can craft your Trial Keys and no  more waiting for vaults to be avilable
body:
# Craftable Trial Key

**Unlock Adventure **

Your Way Tired of looting and luck just to get a Trial Key? Same. This datapack lets you craft your own gateway to the Trial Chambers — no vault crawling, no waiting, just instant access to the action.

Note: “Trial Key Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If you are interested in more Datapacks check out the links at the end of desciprtion.

**🧠 Why It’s Better**
Because exploration should be exciting, not exhausting. Whether you're speedrunning chambers, farming loot, or just want to test your mettle, this pack puts the keys in your hands — literally.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip
 
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
 
3. Type /reload in-game
 
4. Craft your Trial Key and start unlocking

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Try out some more datapacks if you wish:

 
[Craftable Totem Of Undying Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/totembygreen)
